title: Irish Vermicelli Pasta
description: A French-inspired dish that combines the flavors of Ireland with the elegance of vermicelli pasta. This recipe is a perfect blend of creamy sauce and tender pasta.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the vermicelli pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining.
In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the heavy cream and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the cream by half, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the Irish cheddar cheese until melted and smooth.
Add the cooked pasta to the cheese sauce, tossing to combine.
If the sauce seems too thick, add a little of the reserved pasta water.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
